title: Measurement Device (Simplified Input)
description: A user-friendly form to register a measurement or characterization device: its name, manufacturer, model, and calibration status. This input will be automatically converted to a standardised RDF representation (OBI/PMDCo OO-LD).

device_name.title: Device Name
device_name.description: A human-readable name or identifier for this device. Include enough detail to distinguish it from similar devices in the same lab (e.g. 'Zwick Z250 #1', 'Zeiss EVO MA15 Lab-A').

device_id.title: Device ID
device_id.description: Optional. Identifier (IRI slug) for this device node in the RDF graph. Auto-derived from device_name if omitted.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional free-text description of the device or its capabilities.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name or number as given by the manufacturer.

serial_number.title: Serial Number
serial_number.description: Serial number assigned by the manufacturer to this individual unit.

calibration_date.title: Last Calibration Date
calibration_date.description: Date of the most recent calibration, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).
